Class ProductReader<T extends Product>

java.lang.Object
src.baseabstractions.ObjectReader<T>
src.console.ProductReader<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of Product object to be read, must extend Product
public class ProductReader<T extends Product> extends ObjectReader<T>
Reader class for interactive console input of Product objects. Provides methods to read and validate all Product fields from user input.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ProductReader(ProductBuilder<T> builder, ReaderWriter readerWriter)
    Constructs a ProductReader with the specified builder and reader/writer.

    Reads and validates the product coordinates from console input.

    Reads and validates the product manufacture cost from console input.

  • Constructor Details

    • ProductReader

      public ProductReader(ProductBuilder<T> builder, ReaderWriter readerWriter)
      Constructs a ProductReader with the specified builder and reader/writer.
      Parameters:
      builder - the ProductBuilder to use for constructing Product objects
      readerWriter - the reader/writer for console I/O operations

  • Method Details

    • readName

      public void readName()
      Reads and validates the product name from console input. Recursively prompts until a valid name is entered.

    • readCoordinates

      public void readCoordinates()
      Reads and validates the product coordinates from console input. Handles X and Y coordinates separately with validation for X invalid input: '<'= 321. Recursively prompts if validation fails.

    • readPrice

      public void readPrice()
      Reads and validates the product price from console input. Recursively prompts until a valid price is entered.

    • readPartNumber

      public void readPartNumber()
      Reads and validates the product part number from console input. Recursively prompts until a valid part number is entered.

    • readManufactureCost

      public void readManufactureCost()
      Reads and validates the product manufacture cost from console input. Recursively prompts until a valid cost value is entered.

    • readUnitOfMeasure

      public void readUnitOfMeasure()
      Reads and validates the product unit of measure from console input. Displays available options and allows empty input for null value. Recursively prompts until a valid unit is entered.
